lyrics:
Lyric BOYNEXTDOOR - I Feel Good (English Ver.)

Romanization

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
U won't
(BOYNEXTDOOR)
I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
Y'all want?
Get the hell outside, bruh!

We steppin' out now, yeah, volume go crazy
Moonwalking downtown, move it, feel like I'm MJ
Microphone check 1, 2
(Oh we got some dang!)

Sunshine good vibes (Yeah vacay)
No sweating catch heat (Sway like that)
Alcohol free sipping that tea,
we're drunk on the vibe
(Yeah that's right)
I don't give a what, we going high speeds

I got no problem, just do my thing
We going around and we living it up, just like that
Spin the world like a basketball
Tokyo, New York, London to Seoul
Go, vroom, let's take it higher

Beat drop, head nod, act like a rockstar
Baby you just love it that way
Talking 'bout my outfit, take pics, drive me crazy
Baby make it loud everyday when I say

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
U won't
When I say
I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
Y'all want?

For breakfast I take my melody
Singing the milk I drink, look in the mirror
Shake that body, feel it in me
Moving so dangerously, I feel good

I got no problem, just do my thing
We going around and we moving it,
just do your dance
Spin the world like a basketball
Tokyo, New York, London to Seoul
Go, vroom, let's take it higher

Beat drop, head nod, act like a rockstar
Baby you just love it that way
Talking 'bout my outfit, take pics, drive me crazy
Baby make it loud everyday when I say

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
U won't
When I say
I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
Y'all want?

(Get'em up, get'em up, get'em up, get'em up)
I don't need your 2 cents, I'm an animal
You keep playa hating, we just having fun
(We just having fun)
You ain't saying jack, you better hit the road
Sing it la la la la la
(I feel high baby)

Hangeul

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
U won't
(BOYNEXTDOOR)
I feel good, I feel good, I feel good

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good

We going around and we moving it,
just do your dance

Go, vroom, let's take it higher

Beat drop, head nod, act like a rockstar
Baby you just love it that way

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good
U won't

I feel good, I feel good, I feel good

(Get'em up, get'em up, get'em up, get'em up)
I don't need your 2 cents, I'm an animal
You keep playa hating, we just having fun
(We just having fun)

Lyric BOYNEXTDOOR - Next Mistake

Romanization

Sorry babe
chae eolma mot ga bareul meomchugo
Sorry babe
amuraedo you might be my next mistake

tto sijakhal geomyeon gwandwo
nado nal ihae mothaneunde deo
What could I do? What should I do?
gateun got dareun siseon iyuneun chaja mwol hae

gongheohami sireo chajeun love
It started smooth but meojiana tto
igijeogeuro gul geo ppeonhajiman geuraedo
Please, please, love me

bureuteun nune jamgin moksori
saebyeok jeongjeok fan sound
teopteophaejin uri sai
Baby, should I let it end?

Sorry babe
chae eolma mot ga bareul meomchugo
Sorry babe
amuraedo you might be my next mistake

Recipe eomneun ibyeore
gwansangyong kkocheul ollyeo
oeroumi sireul ppunin uri

jajonsim vs sarangeun always
ohaehal yeojido eopsi ppeonhae
igijeogeuro gul geo ppeonhajiman geuraedo
Please, please, love me

bureuteun nune jamgin moksori
saebyeok jeongjeok fan sound
teopteophaejin uri sai
Baby, should I let it end?

Sorry babe
chae eolma mot ga bareul meomchugo
Sorry babe
amuraedo you might be my next mistake

Hangeul

Sorry babe
채 얼마 못 가 발을 멈추고
Sorry babe
아무래도 you might be my next mistake

또 시작할 거면 관둬
나도 날 이해 못하는데 더
What could I do? What should I do?
같은 곳 다른 시선 이유는 찾아 뭘 해

공허함이 싫어 찾은 love
It started smooth but 머지않아 또
이기적으로 굴 거 뻔하지만 그래도
Please, please, love me

부르튼 눈에 잠긴 목소리
새벽 정적 fan sound
텁텁해진 우리 사이
Baby, should I let it end?

Sorry babe
채 얼마 못 가 발을 멈추고
Sorry babe
아무래도 you might be my next mistake

Recipe 없는 이별에
관상용 꽃을 올려
외로움이 싫을 뿐인 우리

자존심 vs 사랑은 always
오해할 여지도 없이 뻔해
이기적으로 굴 거 뻔하지만 그래도
Please, please, love me

부르튼 눈에 잠긴 목소리
새벽 정적 fan sound
텁텁해진 우리 사이
Baby, should I let it end?

Sorry babe
채 얼마 못 가 발을 멈추고
Sorry babe
아무래도 you might be my next mistake
